title: Modal
description: Centered modal dialog with focus trap, scroll lock, and FLIP-style animation from the triggering button. Supports sizes, header with title/description, and a footer slot.

playground.title: Confirm action
playground.body: Do you want to apply these changes?

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Triggered by a button with v-model. Footer with cancel/confirm actions.
basic.modalDesc: Do you want to apply these changes?
basic.body: The change is reversible from the history.

form.title: With form
form.desc: Useful for creating or editing entities without leaving the current context.

locked.title: No overlay-close
locked.desc: For critical actions, force an explicit decision by disabling overlay and Escape.
locked.body: Only closes with the explicit button.

full.title: Fullscreen
full.desc: size='full' fills the entire viewport — ideal for immersive detail views.

scroll.title: Scrollable content
scroll.desc: The modal body can scroll internally without blocking the rest of the layout.
scroll.paragraph: Paragraph {i} with long text to force internal scroll.

props.title: Accessible title — rendered in header when no slot is provided.
props.showClose: Show the close (X) button in the corner.
props.color: Accent color applied to border and ring.
props.innerBorder: Renders a subtle inner border inside the main border.
props.origin: Origin element for the FLIP-style animation.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible label when there is no title.

slots.header: Replaces the header generated from title/description.
slots.footer: Actions at the bottom of the modal (cancel/confirm buttons).
